channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-22 17:30 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: "The overall goal of my companies is to maximize the future of civilization. Basically maximize the ...
item.description: "The overall goal of my companies is to maximize the future of civilization. Basically maximize the probability that civilization has a great future and to expand consciousness beyond Earth. Take SpaceX for example, that SpaceX is about advancing rocket technology to the point where we can extend life & consciousness beyond Earth to the moon, to Mars, eventually to other star systems. I think we should always view consciousness as we know it as precarious & delicate, because to the best of our knowledge, we don't know of life anywhere else." 一 Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: I love the way this is framed. New congressional districts that would disenfranchise almost half of ...
item.description: I love the way this is framed. New congressional districts that would disenfranchise almost half of Virginia GOP voters are designed "to restore fairness in the upcoming elections." Modern American politics is just lies piled upon lies.

item.title: @elonmusk: VA law REQUIRES that ballot language be "a neutral explanation." This language is CLEARLY illegal. A...
item.description: VA law REQUIRES that ballot language be "a neutral explanation." This language is CLEARLY illegal. A court ruled as much...and Democrats ignored the court and waited for a different court to punt on the question till after the illegal referendum.

item.title: @elonmusk: Democrats in Virginia today are voting to strip democracy from the process, eliminating Republican v...
item.description: Democrats in Virginia today are voting to strip democracy from the process, eliminating Republican voices from congress They are fascists and unrepentant The actions of Texas or any other state are immaterial to the concept of democracy in Virginia

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 Datacenters are now 7% of total U.S. power demand
item.description: 🚨 Datacenters are now 7% of total U.S. power demand

item.title: @elonmusk: Well, credit where credit is due…
item.description: Well, credit where credit is due…

item.title: @elonmusk: Unpopular opinion: Grok 4.3 is surprisingly good as a chatbot. Might actually cancel my Gemini subsc...
item.description: Unpopular opinion: Grok 4.3 is surprisingly good as a chatbot. Might actually cancel my Gemini subscription.

item.title: @elonmusk: Some SPLC donors were tricked into funding white nationalist hate groups. That’s bad. Some SPLC dono...
item.description: Some SPLC donors were tricked into funding white nationalist hate groups. That’s bad. Some SPLC donors knew they were funding white nationalist hate groups. That’s worse. What did they know and when they know it? Who was a dupe and who was complicit?

item.title: @elonmusk: The Sun rounds up to 100% of energy in our solar system, even if Jupiter and all non-solar mass is b...
item.description: The Sun rounds up to 100% of energy in our solar system, even if Jupiter and all non-solar mass is burned

item.title: @elonmusk: NEWS: U.S. Birth Rate hits record low as abortion numbers rise • ~1.1M+ abortions annually • One of ...
item.description: NEWS: U.S. Birth Rate hits record low as abortion numbers rise • ~1.1M+ abortions annually • One of the highest levels in recent years • ~21% increase since 2020 • Fertility rate falls to ~1.57 births per woman (record low) • Far below 2.1 replacement level • Total births ~3.6 million • Nearly 2 decades of declining births • Long-term impact on population & economy This is exactly what@elonmuskhas been warning about for years.

item.title: @elonmusk: Should I start naming the SPLC board members?
item.description: Should I start naming the SPLC board members?

item.title: @elonmusk: And who is paying for it?
item.description: And who is paying for it?
